title: Spider Gesture Sensing Remote Control Car, Double Sided RC Cars, Full-Body Light, 2.4GHz Controller, 360° Rotating, Rechargeable Battery, RC Stunt Car Birthday for Boys 6 7 8 9 10
features: 【Unique Design & Eye-Catching Lights】 Our double-sided remote control car boasts a vibrant, full-colour body that’s sure to turn heads! With cool headlights, tail lights, and tyre lights, it shines bright day and night – keeping the fun going no matter the time. Whether racing in the garden or showing off indoors, your child will stand out from the crowd and be the centre of attention wherever they play.

【360° Spins, Drifts & Double-Sided Stunts】 This stunt car does it all: zip forward, reverse, turn left/right, drift smoothly, and spin 360° on the spot! But the real magic? Its double-sided driving – flip it over, and it keeps racing, easily tackling obstacles as it zooms on both sides. Expertly crafted with a one-piece design, it’s shockproof, drop-resistant, and built to last. Perfect for indoor and outdoor adventures – from carpets and stairs to pavements and grass, it handles it all!

【2.4GHz Anti-Interference & 4WD Power】 Thanks to 2.4GHz technology, multiple cars can race at once without signal interference – ideal for group play with friends! With a 40m control range, the 4WD system delivers powerful performance, so it zips over tricky terrain with ease. Kids will love competing in their own races and challenges – endless fun guaranteed! (Handle remote requires 2 AA batteries, gesture remote requires 2 AAA batteries, not included.)

【Easy USB Charging】 No faffing around! This rechargeable RC car comes with a 600mAh battery and charges directly via USB – no need to remove the battery. A full charge takes just 40 minutes, and it keeps kids entertained for hours. Convenient, quick, and ready for action whenever they are!

【The Perfect Gift for Young Stunt Fans】 Made from tough ABS plastic, this RC car is stable, impact-resistant, and built to handle bumps and tumbles – perfect for energetic play. Whether in the living room, backyard, or park, it’s designed for non-stop fun. A brilliant gift for boys and girls who love stunt cars – they’ll be racing, spinning, and flipping with joy!
